question: Use of friend functions. Add two more functions in class Distance: 1. friend istream &operator>>( istream &input, Distance &D ) 2. friend ostream &operator<<( ostream &output, const Distance &D ). In these two functions you have to Input and Output the Distance object.

test_cases.expected:
Enter distance 1:
Enter feet: Enter inches: Enter distance 2:
Enter feet: Enter inches: 
Distance 1: 5 feet 8 inches
Distance 2: 3 feet 6 inches
After ++d1: 6 feet 9 inches
After --d2: 2 feet 5 inches
d3 = -d1: -6 feet -9 inches
d4 = d2: 2 feet 5 inches

driver: int main() { Distance d1, d2; cout << "Enter distance 1:" << endl; cin >> d1; cout << "Enter distance 2:" << endl; cin >> d2; cout << "\nDistance 1: " << d1 << endl; cout << "Distance 2: " << d2 << endl; ++d1; cout << "After ++d1: " << d1 << endl; --d2; cout << "After --d2: " << d2 << endl; Distance d3 = -d1; cout << "d3 = -d1: " << d3 << endl; Distance d4; d4 = d2; cout << "d4 = d2: " << d4 << endl; return 0; }
